Package calendar.controller

Class CommandHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.controller.CommandHandler
  • public class CommandHandler
extends java.lang.Object
    Executes parsed commands by coordinating between model and view.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      CommandHandler​(CalendarModel model, CalendarView view)
      Creates a command handler.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void execute​(ParsedCommand command)
      Executes a parsed command by consulting the command registry.
      void handleCopyEvent​(CopyEventParams params)
      Handles copy event command.
      void handleCopyEventsBetween​(CopyEventsBetweenParams params)
      Handles copy events between command.
      void handleCopyEventsOn​(CopyEventsOnParams params)
      Handles copy events on command.
      void handleCreateCalendar​(CreateCalendarParams params)
      Handles the create calendar command.
      void handleCreateEvent​(CreateEventParams params)
      Handles create event command.
      void handleEditAllSeries​(EditEventParams params)
      Handles edit series command.
      void handleEditCalendar​(EditCalendarParams params)
      Handles edit calendar command.
      void handleEditEvent​(EditEventParams params)
      Handles edit event command.
      void handleEditSeries​(EditEventParams params)
      Handles edit events (series from date) command.
      void handleExit()
      Handles exit command.
      void handleExport​(ExportParams params)
      Handles export command.
      void handlePrintDate​(PrintDateParams params)
      Handles print date command.
      void handlePrintRange​(PrintRangeParams params)
      Handles print range command.
      void handleStatus​(StatusParams params)
      Handles status command.
      void handleUseCalendar​(UseCalendarParams params)
      Handles use calendar command.
      void handleViewDay​(ViewDateParams params)
      Handles view day command - displays formatted day view.
      void handleViewMonth​(ViewDateParams params)
      Handles view month command - displays formatted month view.
      void handleViewWeek​(ViewDateParams params)
      Handles view week command - displays formatted week view.
